falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and pattern similarity to a prior bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average volume with a clear bullish divergence on the RSI indicator
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume with technical confirmation would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear buying pressure

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 70+ while the price makes a new 6-month high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would directly contradict the current pattern match and prove the HOLD signal was incorrect

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
